description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Run an eligibility check for a 32-year-old in California with a $28,000 annual household income and a household size of 2, then from the recommended options open the plan with the lowest monthly price.
tasks.name: Run an eligibility check for a 32-year-old in California with a $28,000 annual household income and a household size of 2, then from the recommended options open the plan with the lowest monthly price.
tasks.description: Run an eligibility check for a 32-year-old in California with a $28,000 annual household income and a household size of 2, then from the recommended options open the plan with the lowest monthly price.

tasks.instruction: On the plans and pricing page, select three adult digital health card plans to compare, then using the emergency room visit copay row choose and save the plan whose ER copay is the lowest amount under $60.
tasks.name: On the plans and pricing page, select three adult digital health card plans to compare, then using the emergency room visit copay row choose and save the plan whose ER copay is the lowest amount under $60.
tasks.description: On the plans and pricing page, select three adult digital health card plans to compare, then using the emergency room visit copay row choose and save the plan whose ER copay is the lowest amount under $60.

tasks.instruction: In the cost estimator, search for an MRI scan near ZIP code 10001 using your digital health card benefits, filter to facilities within 10 miles, sort by total estimated cost from low to high, and open the details page for the second facility in the sorted list.
tasks.name: In the cost estimator, search for an MRI scan near ZIP code 10001 using your digital health card benefits, filter to facilities within 10 miles, sort by total estimated cost from low to high, and open the details page for the second facility in the sorted list.

tasks.instruction: Search for pediatricians near ZIP code 30301, filter to providers within 5 miles who have at least 4 stars and are accepting new patients, then open the first result and add that provider to your saved list.
tasks.name: Search for pediatricians near ZIP code 30301, filter to providers within 5 miles who have at least 4 stars and are accepting new patients, then open the first result and add that provider to your saved list.

tasks.instruction: Switch the site language to Spanish, navigate to the pharmacy usage examples, filter for generic prescriptions costing at most $20, then open the instructions for the first example shown.
tasks.name: Switch the site language to Spanish, navigate to the pharmacy usage examples, filter for generic prescriptions costing at most $20, then open the instructions for the first example shown.

tasks.instruction: Turn on high contrast mode, increase the text size to 125%, then go to the coverage section and open the coverage summary page for mental health and counseling services.
tasks.name: Turn on high contrast mode, increase the text size to 125%, then go to the coverage section and open the coverage summary page for mental health and counseling services.

tasks.instruction: From the Help & FAQs section, search for information about a lost phone, use the link to request a temporary card, fill out the first step of the request form with the specified full name, date of birth, and text message as the preferred contact method, then continue to the review step.

target_names: What if I lose my phone with my digital health card?

tasks.name: From the Help & FAQs section, search for information about a lost phone, use the link to request a temporary card, fill out the first step of the request form with the specified full name, date of birth, and text message as the preferred contact method, then continue to the review step.
tasks.description: From the Help & FAQs section, search for information about a lost phone, use the link to request a temporary card, fill out the first step of the request form with the specified full name, date of birth, and text message as the preferred contact method, then continue to the review step.

tasks.instruction: Run an eligibility check for a 7-year-old child in ZIP code 60601 with a $1,500 monthly household income, then among the child plans sort by monthly fee and open the cheapest option that costs less than $40 per month.
tasks.name: Run an eligibility check for a 7-year-old child in ZIP code 60601 with a $1,500 monthly household income, then among the child plans sort by monthly fee and open the cheapest option that costs less than $40 per month.

tasks.instruction: Filter the resources to brochures and guides for students and young adults published in 2026, then open the PDF for the student-focused guide that appears in the filtered list.
